prompt_en: Say: It is essential that leaders demonstrate genuine ambition for public service.
expected_es: Es esencial que los líderes sean de una ambición genuina para el servicio público.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here to describe an inherent, essential quality (ambition) that is required, triggering the subjunctive mood.

prompt_en: Say: The spill was caused by negligence, which is why a red alert was activated.
expected_es: El vertido fue causado por negligencia, por lo que fue activada una alerta roja.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used for the passive voice, indicating the agent or cause of the action, and for the activation of the alert as a resulting event.

prompt_en: Say: This didactic material was specifically for the new C1 Spanish course.
expected_es: Este material didáctico fue específicamente para el nuevo curso de español C1.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here to express the purpose or destination of the didactic material.

prompt_en: Say: Overcoming the generation gap would be a significant challenge for modern families.
expected_es: Superar la brecha generacional sería un desafío significativo para las familias modernas.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to define what overcoming the generation gap inherently 'is' (a challenge), expressed in the conditional mood.

prompt_en: Say: The final boarding call was always at gate 7, but the plane was never on time.
expected_es: La última llamada para embarcar siempre era en la puerta de embarque 7, pero el avión nunca estaba a tiempo.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used for the location of an event (the boarding call happening at a specific gate), as opposed to ESTAR for the temporary location or state of the plane.

prompt_en: Say: I doubt that the litigation is resolved fairly, given the precedents.
expected_es: Dudo que el litigio sea resuelto justamente, dados los precedentes.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used for the passive voice (the litigation 'being resolved'), and the expression of doubt triggers the subjunctive mood.

prompt_en: Say: The complete electrical installation will be essential for the safety of the renovated building.
expected_es: La instalación eléctrica completa será esencial para la seguridad del edificio reformado.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe an inherent and permanent characteristic or necessity (being essential) for the future state of the building.

prompt_en: Say: It has been over a month since she has been on medical leave, which is very unusual for her.
expected_es: Ha sido más de un mes que ella ha estado de baja médica, lo cual es muy inusual para ella.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER (ha sido) is used to express the duration or amount of time that has passed, while ESTAR describes her current temporary state of being on leave.

prompt_en: Say: It was important that extreme caution was observed during the delicate operation.
expected_es: Era importante que fuera observada extrema cautela durante la delicada operación.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here in the passive voice with an impersonal expression ('Era importante que...') to express a past necessity or recommendation, triggering the imperfect subjunctive.

prompt_en: Say: By next month, the storage room will have been completely cleared out and ready for new use.
expected_es: Para el próximo mes, el trastero habrá sido vaciado completamente y estará listo para un nuevo uso.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here to form the future perfect passive voice, indicating an action that will have been completed by a certain future time.
